title: feela A5 Notebooks Multipack, 3 Pack Ruled Lined Notepads A5 (120 GSM), Hardback Journal Notebook with 3 Black Gel Pens, 128 Pages/Pack, 21 x 13cm, Pastel Colours, Lavender, Light Blue, Light Green
features: Feela 3 Pack A5 Classic Ruled lined Notebooks contains 3 classic ruled sturdy cover note books and 3 black retractable gel pens. Each of the notebook measures 21 x 13 cm, which is perfect to carry by students. These cute pens are customized to be placed in the pen holder, which is pretty convenient.

Feela Notepads A5 multipack are all blank inside with 128 lined pages (64 sheets), which would be convenient for daily usage. The hardcover journal notebook has a water-resistant faux leather cover, round corners and bookmarks, which is designed to lay and open flat. There’s a ‘date/page’ column on the top of every page. You can use it as a reminder to let you remember those important dates and find the page you want in a very short time.

Bonus 3 Black Retractable Pens in the box. These pens are perfect to be put in the pen holder of the classic ruled notebook. Large tube has the capacity of restoring more ink, which makes them long lasting. Quick drying can avoid smearing and smudge.

Feela 3 Pack Classic Ruled Notebooks Set would be perfect for many people and lots of occasions. Students of primary school and classic can use it to write down notes or hand in homework. Commuters can use it to arrange your daily work schedule and jot down important milestones. Your small girl or boy can use it as the start of doodling and writing.
Performance&Satisfaction: We provide you with not only our high quality products but also our quick response service.
